question: Why is teamwork considered a crucial life skill?
correct_answer: It improves personal and social interactions.
wrong_answers_pool: It makes you physically stronger.
It means you don't need friends.
It only matters when playing sports.
It means you never have to work hard.
It allows you to ignore others.
It helps you win arguments always.
explanation: teamwork plays a significant role in fostering better relationships and personal growth.
